description:
A configuration–management audit needs you to record and implement a single
  parameter change inside a text-based configuration file.

  Initial state:
    • One file already exists at
        /home/user/configs/app.cfg
    • Its exact initial contents are:
        # Application Configuration
        VERSION=1.4.2
        ENABLED=false
        LOG_LEVEL=info

  What you must do (2 – 3 standard shell commands will suffice):
    1. Make a safety copy of /home/user/configs/app.cfg in the same directory;
       the copy MUST be named /home/user/configs/app.cfg.bak.
    2. In the original file (/home/user/configs/app.cfg), switch the single
       parameter “ENABLED” from “false” to “true”, leaving everything else
       untouched.
    3. Append a small, machine-readable log of the change.  Create the
       directory /home/user/change_records (if it does not yet exist) and
       add a new file called 2024-ConfigToggle.log inside that directory
       whose contents are EXACTLY four lines, in this order:

          FILE:/home/user/configs/app.cfg
          BEFORE:ENABLED=false
          AFTER:ENABLED=true
          STATUS:OK

       • No leading or trailing spaces on any line.
       • A trailing newline after the final “STATUS:OK” line **is** required.

  Verification notes the automated grader will use:
    • /home/user/configs/app.cfg.bak must exist and still contain
      “ENABLED=false”.
    • /home/user/configs/app.cfg must now contain “ENABLED=true”.
    • /home/user/change_records/2024-ConfigToggle.log must exist and match
      the four-line format above exactly (including the final newline).

  When you are done, the three artefacts (the updated config file, the backup,
  and the change log) should be in place with the precise contents stated
  here.
truth:
Initial file created by the test harness before the agent starts:
    Path: /home/user/configs/app.cfg
    Content (including final newline):
      # Application Configuration
      VERSION=1.4.2
      ENABLED=false
      LOG_LEVEL=info

  After successful completion the grader will check:

    1. Backup file:
       Path: /home/user/configs/app.cfg.bak
       Expected content (unchanged):
         # Application Configuration
         VERSION=1.4.2
         ENABLED=false
         LOG_LEVEL=info

    2. Modified original:
       Path: /home/user/configs/app.cfg
       Expected content:
         # Application Configuration
         VERSION=1.4.2
         ENABLED=true
         LOG_LEVEL=info

    3. Log file:
       Path: /home/user/change_records/2024-ConfigToggle.log
       Expected content (note final newline):
         FILE:/home/user/configs/app.cfg
         BEFORE:ENABLED=false
         AFTER:ENABLED=true
         STATUS:OK

  All directories will be pre-created except /home/user/change_records, which
  the agent should create with default user permissions (700 or 755 are both
  acceptable).
